prompt: I want to go deeper with Kelet — add more signals and get better coverage
app_description: FastAPI + pydantic-ai. Already has kelet.configure() and agentic_session() wired. Plain HTML frontend, no React. Developer explicitly wants full mode: more signals, better failure coverage.

assertions.description: Does not re-add configure() or agentic_session() — skips already-done work
Proposes at least one additional coded signal beyond what's already in place (e.g. server-side event for errors, retries, or abandonment)
Proposes more synthetic evaluators than the default Task Completion (e.g. Sentiment Analysis, Conversation Completeness, or role-specific ones)
Does not propose VoteFeedback or React since app has no React frontend
Explains what each new signal or evaluator catches — not just lists them
